case_title: MACARTHUR GLASS CO. VS TIENTURIER, ALAN M.

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TIENTURIER, ALAN M. HEARING SET FOR FEB-07-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-07-1997, GRANTED
CERT MAIL TO ALAN M.TIENTURIER RETURNED BY THE POST OFFICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $553.72 FILED BY MACARTHUR GLASS CO. AS TO DEFENDANT TIENTURIER, ALAN M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-24-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACARTHUR GLASS CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIENTURIER, ALAN M. $553.72 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $574.72 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TIENTURIER, ALAN M.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT TIENTURIER, ALAN M. DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. VENUE NOT PROPER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
